creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #6)

I did a quick grep and found that graphics/libchamplain08 depends on graphics/gtk-clutter and graphics/geeqie depends on libchamplain08.  That's the only obvious dependency left that I found.  I don't know whether geeqie could be updated to avoid depending on these older packages.
